name: AS506_DifferentAppliance
description: This intent is used when the customer wants to choose a different appliance than the ones currently listed. The customer may say phrases like “different", "different appliances", “another appliance”, “not listed”, or indicate that their appliance is not shown. This intent should guide the customer to view or select other available natural gas appliances for service.
